infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Field Notes records site video while you walk and narrate.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Field Notes captures your spoken field notes with the video.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Field Notes tags captures with GPS for site memory.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Field Notes to record site video.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Field Notes to capture spoken notes.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Field Notes to tag captures with GPS.
